<?php namespace Illuminate\Http\Exceptions; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Exception\TooManyRequestsHttpException; use Throwable; class ThrottleRequestsException extends TooManyRequestsHttpException { /** * Create a new throttle requests exception instance. * * @param string $message * @param \Throwable|null $previous * @param array $headers * @param int $code */ public function __construct($message = '', ?Throwable $previous = null, array $headers = [], $code = 0) { parent::__construct(null, $message, $previous, $code, $headers); } }
